ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness level of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness level of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature_1" INTEGER /* Time signature 1 (binary representation) */,
  "time_signature_3" INTEGER /* Time signature 3 (binary representation) */,
  "time_signature_4" INTEGER /* Time signature 4 (binary representation) */,
  "time_signature_5" INTEGER /* Time signature 5 (binary representation) */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Licensing type of the track */,
  "track_url" TEXT /* URL where the track can be accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_track_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the track */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has skipped the track */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has liked the track */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has disliked the track */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the track */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_track_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_track_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "artist_country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "artist_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
